title: ChatGPT
description:
The industry-leading conversational agent powered by GPT-5.
Excels at complex reasoning, coding, and multimodal creative tasks.

title: Google Gemini
description:
Google's most capable multimodal AI integrated into Workspace.
Features a massive 2-million token context window for deep research.

title: Claude
description:
Anthropic's safety-focused AI known for human-like writing.
Highly preferred by developers for its precise coding and Artifacts UI.

title: Perplexity AI
description:
An AI-native search engine providing real-time cited answers.
Replaces traditional search for researchers and knowledge workers.

title: Midjourney
description:
The gold standard for high-fidelity AI image generation.
Version 7 offers unparalleled photorealism and artistic control.

title: ElevenLabs
description:
Advanced AI audio platform for lifelike speech synthesis.
Supports instant voice cloning and high-fidelity dubbing in 30+ languages.

title: Cursor
description:
An AI-powered code editor built on top of VS Code.
Features a native 'Agent Mode' for multi-file software engineering.

title: Canva Magic Studio
description:
Design platform enhanced with a full suite of AI tools.
Includes text-to-graphic, photo expansion, and automated layouts.

title: Suno
description:
Generative AI for high-fidelity music and full song creation.
Produces radio-quality tracks with lyrics and vocals from text.

title: Runway Gen-3
description:
Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.
Offers advanced temporal consistency for cinematic storytelling.

title: Grammarly AI
description:
Personalized writing assistant for clarity and professional tone.
Now includes generative AI prompts for instant drafting and rewrites.

title: Notion AI
description:
AI-powered workspace for notes, docs, and project management.
Summarizes long meetings and extracts action items automatically.

title: HeyGen
description:
AI video platform for creating photorealistic talking avatars.
Automates lip-syncing for marketing and educational content.

title: DeepL
description:
The world's most accurate AI translator using neural networks.
Outperforms competitors in nuance and professional terminology.

title: Zapier Central
description:
Automation hub for creating custom AI agents and workflows.
Connects 6,000+ apps to perform complex, multi-step digital tasks.

title: Microsoft Copilot
description:
Your everyday AI companion integrated into Windows and Office.
Enhances productivity across Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook.

title: Jasper
description:
Enterprise-grade AI content platform for marketing teams.
Ensures brand voice consistency across all generated copy.

title: Descript
description:
AI-powered video and podcast editor using text-based editing.
Features 'Overdub' for voice correction and automated studio sound.

title: Kimi
description:
Rising star in long-context AI processing and chat.
Highly efficient for analyzing thousands of pages of documents.

title: Leonardo.ai
description:
Creative production platform for high-quality visual assets.
Offers fine-tuned models for gaming and marketing materials.

title: Fireflies.ai
description:
AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and analyzes calls.
Automatically syncs summaries to CRMs and project tools.

title: Hugging Face
description:
The open-source community's home for pre-trained AI models.
Essential for developers building and hosting their own AI apps.

title: Luma Dream Machine
description:
High-speed AI video generator for realistic 5-second clips.
Known for smooth motion and physical accuracy in animations.

title: NotebookLM
description:
Google's AI research assistant for making sense of complex data.
Creates interactive 'Audio Overviews' and podcast-style summaries.
